title: CI-RED-015-D reframe to MVP-path scope (docs only)
intent: Record the MVP-path-scoped resolution for the wire-collision bucket: static 68 is inflated because the audit ignores include_router composition; resolution is to check only MVP live-path routes and defer structural debt at retirement. Adds a superseded-note to the audit handoff. No code or CI behavior change.

diff_articulation.what_changed: SPRINTS.md CI-RED-015-D rewritten from 'two PRs (audit + gate rewrite)' to 'MVP-path scoped' with stopping criterion, X/Y/Z + non-deterministic-winner bucketing, and explicit out-of-scope (gate replacement, manifesting 143, ~60 non-MVP collisions). Handoff doc gets a 2026-05-28 superseded note about the include_router composition limitation.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The original ledger framed 68 collisions as fix-then-gate-rewrite; that overstated the problem (composition-ignorant static count) and overscoped the work for the home stretch. The reframe is durable institutional knowledge with a concrete stopping criterion.

files.intent: Rewrite CI-RED-015-D ledger to MVP-path-scoped resolution + stopping criterion; update top Next table.
Add 2026-05-28 note: static audit ignores include_router composition; 68 inflated; see SPRINTS for scoped resolution.
verification: Review superseded-note block at top of handoff
